message:
feat(tui): add Board mode external link support and fix board detail scroll tracking

Extends the open-link (o) and copy-link (y) keybindings to work in Board mode
by adding ViewMode::Board to should_open/copy_selected_issue_external_ref
match arms and implementing link-line detection for board detail panels.

Fixes board detail scroll tracking: the detail panel now uses a dedicated
board_detail_scroll_offset instead of sharing detail_scroll_offset, which was
causing the board and main view scrolls to interfere. The render path now
computes total_lines from the pre-rendered text and clamps the scroll offset.

Also shows a status line hint ("o open link | y copy link") in board mode
footer when the selected issue has an external reference URL, and displays
status_msg when non-empty (matching the pattern used by other view modes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
